entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: Bacterium that produces cry1Ab and cry1Ac delta-endotoxins used in transgenic crops

entities.name: CRY1AB
entities.description: Delta-endotoxin protein/gene from Bacillus thuringiensis used to enhance insect resistance in crops

entities.name: CRY1AC
entities.description: Delta-endotoxin protein/gene from Bacillus thuringiensis used to enhance insect resistance in crops

entities.name: CHEILOMENES SEXMACULATUS
entities.description: Coccinellid beetle/ladybird beetle that acts as a natural enemy of insect pests

entities.name: TRANSGENIC PLANTS
entities.description: Crops genetically modified to express Bt toxins for insect resistance

entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist attack by insect pests

entities.name: APHIDS
entities.description: Soft bodied insects that serve as prey for Cheilomenes sexmaculatus

entities.name: LEPIDOPTERANS
entities.description: Insects whose early instar larvae are preyed upon by Cheilomenes sexmaculatus

entities.name: DIRECT EXPOSURE
entities.description: Condition where Cheilomenes sexmaculatus larvae are fed toxins directly in a sucrose solution

entities.name: INDIRECT EXPOSURE
entities.description: Condition where Cheilomenes sexmaculatus larvae feed on prey that have ingested toxins

entities.name: LARVAL SURVIVAL
entities.description: The rate of survival of larvae during their development

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The rate at which larvae successfully develop into adults

entities.name: APHIS CRACCIVORA
entities.description: Specific aphid species used as a vector in indirect exposure experiments

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: Insect pest preyed upon by Cheilomenes sexmaculatus

entities.name: NATURAL ENEMIES
entities.description: Organisms that control insect pest populations through predation or parasitism

entities.name: GENETIC MODIFICATION
entities.description: The process of incorporating foreign genes into a crop's genome to provide specific traits
